mapper.insert:
SELECT fixed_cost_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO fixed_cost ( fixed_cost_id, store_id, year_month, material_cost, store_delivery_fee, labor_cost, utilities, rent, consumables, other, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{fixedCostId}, #{storeId}, TRUNC(#{yearMonth}, 'MM'), #{materialCost}, #{storeDeliveryFee}, #{laborCost}, #{utilities}, #{rent}, #{consumables}, #{other}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT fixed_cost_id, store_id, year_month, material_cost, store_delivery_fee, labor_cost, utilities, rent, consumables, other, created_at, updated_at FROM fixed_cost WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND year_month = TRUNC(#{yearMonth}, 'MM')

SELECT fixed_cost_id, store_id, year_month, material_cost, store_delivery_fee, labor_cost, utilities, rent, consumables, other, created_at, updated_at FROM fixed_cost WHERE fixed_cost_id = #{fixedCostId}

SELECT fixed_cost_id, store_id, year_month, material_cost, store_delivery_fee, labor_cost, utilities, rent, consumables, other, created_at, updated_at FROM fixed_cost WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY year_month DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE fixed_cost SET material_cost = #{materialCost}, store_delivery_fee = #{storeDeliveryFee}, labor_cost = #{laborCost}, utilities = #{utilities}, rent = #{rent}, consumables = #{consumables}, other = #{other}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE fixed_cost_id = #{fixedCostId}
